title: salix cinerea
intro: Salix cinerea, also known as grey willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its salicin content. The health benefits of Salix cinerea include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as salves, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
